context: Tests whether the agent selects the correct Kotest spec style based on each test file's structure, defaults to StringSpec for flat tests rather than escalating unnecessarily, and correctly replaces JUnit lifecycle annotations with Kotest equivalents.

checklist.name: StringSpec for flat tests
checklist.description: StringFormatterTest is converted to StringSpec (not DescribeSpec or BehaviorSpec)

checklist.name: BehaviorSpec for given/when/then
checklist.description: UserServiceTest is converted to BehaviorSpec (not StringSpec or DescribeSpec)

checklist.name: Tests in string blocks
checklist.description: @Test fun methodName() is replaced with a string-keyed block — "methodName" { } — inside the spec body in both files

checklist.name: beforeEach block used
checklist.description: StringFormatterTest's @BeforeEach setUp() is replaced with a Kotest beforeEach { } block inside the spec body (not a separate method with @BeforeEach)

checklist.name: Setup code preserved
checklist.description: The initialization code (formatter = StringFormatter(locale = "en-US")) is present inside the beforeEach { } block

checklist.name: Correct class declaration
checklist.description: Each class declaration extends the chosen spec style using Kotest constructor syntax (e.g. : StringSpec({ }), : BehaviorSpec({ }))

checklist.name: Kotest spec import present
checklist.description: Each output file imports its spec class from io.kotest.core.spec.style.* (StringSpec or BehaviorSpec as appropriate)

checklist.name: JUnit annotations removed
checklist.description: No @Test, @BeforeEach, or @AfterEach annotations remain in either output file
